content.text:
Based on my examination of the molecule, I can clearly see atom 15 (C:15) and identify its neighbour atoms from the zoomed view.

**Results:**

The atom with index **15** is indeed **Carbon (C)**.

The neighbour atoms covalently connected to C:15 are:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 7 | Carbon (C) |
| 14 | Carbon (C) |
| 16 | Carbon (C) |
| 29 | Hydrogen (H) |

**geomconf_index:** 2434

Atom 15 is a chiral carbon center bonded to three other carbon atoms (indices 7, 14, and 16) and one hydrogen atom (index 29).

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 15, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
